justification: The diff correctly migrates from Spring Boot 2/Java 17 to Spring Boot 3/Java 21, updating javax to jakarta, replacing deprecated springfox with springdoc-openapi, and using Java 21 features like String.formatted() and @Serial. However, the SwaggerConfigurer.java file still imports and references springfox classes (lines 6-11) despite removing the @EnableSwagger2 annotation and the Docket bean, which will cause compilation errors. Also, the pom.xml still references io.springfox.version property which is no longer used.
